name: Businesssolver Benefits Administration API
what_it_does: Businesssolver REST API for AI-powered benefits administration, personalization, and employee benefits engagement. Enables AI agents to manage personalized benefits enrollment and recommendation workflow for employee benefits experience, handle life event and qualifying event management for benefits changes, access AI-driven benefits engagement and communication automation, retrieve ACA compliance tracking and reporting for healthcare coverage management, manage carrier EDI integration and data feeds for benefits carrier operations, handle COBRA and continuation coverage administration for benefits compliance, access benefits analytics and cost management reporting for HR analytics, retrieve dependent verification and documentation management, manage voluntary benefits enrollment and supplemental coverage, and integrate Businesssolver benefits data with HRIS, payroll, and benefits carriers.
use_cases: Personalizing benefits recommendations from AI benefits agents
Automating enrollment from benefits administration agents
Managing ACA compliance from HR compliance agents
Engaging employees from benefits communication agents
not_for: Small employers under 100 without enterprise benefits administration
Payroll-only platforms without benefits enrollment management
International employers without US group benefit plan focus
best_when: A large employer seeking AI-powered benefits personalization wants AI agents to automate benefits recommendations, enrollment, life event management, ACA compliance, and employee engagement.
avoid_when: ACA COMPLIANCE RISK: Businesssolver ACA automation generates 1094/1095 filings — automated reporting errors create IRS Employer Shared Responsibility penalties. ERISA plan document governs benefits eligibility; automated eligibility changes inconsistent with plan document create fiduciary liability. Businesssolver AI personalization must not create plan document discrimination violations; automated benefits recommendations must be non-discriminatory.

auth.notes: Businesssolver uses OAuth 2.0. Webhooks for benefits events. REST API with JSON. West Des Moines, Iowa HQ. Private (KKR PE-backed). Founded 2002. 1,000+ enterprise employer customers. 4M+ employees administered. Businesssolver Benefitsolver platform with Sofie AI. Strong in large employer benefits administration and AI-driven engagement. Competes with bswift, Benefitfocus, and Businesssolver for enterprise benefits administration.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — annual per-employee subscription
pricing.notes: West Des Moines, Iowa. Businesssolver (KKR PE). Founded 2002. 1,000+ enterprise customers. Sofie AI benefits personalization. Competes with bswift and Benefitfocus for large employer benefits administration.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth client; documented per enterprise integration

known_agent_gotchas: ACA COMPLIANCE RISK: Automated ACA reporting requires accurate minimum essential coverage offer data; 1094/1095 errors create IRS Employer Shared Responsibility penalties

AI personalization non-discrimination — Businesssolver Sofie AI benefits recommendations must not create disparate impact in plan selection; automated recommendations must be reviewed for discrimination risk
ERISA plan document consistency — automated benefits eligibility changes must be consistent with plan document; inconsistencies create ERISA fiduciary liability
HIPAA PHI in benefits data — benefits enrollment and claims data contains employee health information; BAA required for all integrations
Carrier EDI 834 timing — automated enrollment changes must generate carrier EDI within enrollment windows; late transmission creates coverage gaps
Open enrollment lock periods — benefits elections typically lock after open enrollment closes; automated changes after lock require qualified life event workflow
agent_readiness.security_notes: Enterprise benefits admin. SOC2, HIPAA. OAuth2. US. Employee benefits and health data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Benefits administration. SOC2, HIPAA. OAuth2. US. Employee benefits and health data.
